arts.sum: Atletico Madrid signed Clement Lenglet on loan from Barcelona last summer, and it is safe to say that he has greatly impressed. arts.sum: Barcelona are out to reclaim top spot in La Liga when Real Sociedad visit the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys today.
